news.summary: Saleh Mohammadi, a member of Iran's national wrestling team, was found guilty of killing police officers alongside two other men, state media say.

news.headline: Netanyahu says Iran’s uranium enrichment abilities destroyed
news.summary: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu claims Iran no longer has “the capacity to enrich uranium."

news.headline: IRGC claims it struck US F-35 over central Iran, with fighter jet’s fate unclear
news.summary:
<p>Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) claimed on Thursday that it had struck and “seriously damaged” a US F-35 fighter jet over central Iran.</p>
<p>In a statement, the IRGC said the aircraft was hit by its air defence systems at around 2:50am (local time) on Thursday

news.headline: ‘Does anyone really think someone can tell Trump what to do?’ Netanyahu denies 'dragging' US 'into Iran war'

news.headline: Israel continues Gaza attacks amid regional war, kills several Palestinians
news.summary: Three killed in separate attacks in Gaza City as Rafah border reopens for limited medical evacuations.
